package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_repository: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated column-name strings outside repository or query packages.
type CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryModel
}

type CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryService struct {
    repo *CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepository(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryDTO) error {
    focus := "column_name_literals_duplicated_outside"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepositoryModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_negative := map[string]int{"column": 1, "name": 2, "literals": 3, "duplicated": 4, "outside": 5, "repository": 6}
    column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    column_negative_0 := db.Where("column_id = ?", input)
    _ = column_negative_0
    name_negative_1 := column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_negative["name"] + len(input)
    _ = name_negative_1
    literals_negative_2 := column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_negative["literals"] + len(input)
    _ = literals_negative_2
    duplicated_negative_3 := column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_negative["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_negative_3
    outside_negative_4 := column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_negative["outside"] + len(input)
    _ = outside_negative_4
    repository_negative_5 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_negative_5
    return nil
}
